name: Thank You...for Loving Me!!
effect_text: [Main] If your Leader's type includes "Whitebeard Piratess", look at 3 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 card with a type including "Whitebeard Piratess" or [Monkey.D.Luffy] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the top or bottom of your deck in any order. [Trigger] Draw 1 card.
